scripts.build:bundle: yarn run -T esbuild ./src/main.ts ./src/entrypoint.ts --bundle --keep-names --minify --platform=node --target=node24 --format=esm --outdir=./dist --out-extension:.js=.mjs --banner:js='import { createRequire } from "node:module"; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);'
scripts.build: yarn run build:bundle && yarn run build:podman
